ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_type" TEXT /* Type of warehouse (e.g., Central, Regional, Local) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy level of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier or donor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., Local, International) */,
  "credit_terms" TEXT /* Credit terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receivers" (
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiver */,
  "receiver_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the supplies are sent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the recipient */,
  "receiver_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., Warehouse, Field Office, Community) */,
  "preferred_delivery_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for delivery (e.g., Morning, Afternoon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the comment refers to */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., send, receive) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "commented_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who made the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_numbers" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the request is related to */,
  "request_number" TEXT /* Request tracking number */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who made the request */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)
